description: This repository is a subset of a larger project and focuses specifically on the development of the manuscript: evaluation/manuscript/SOM_dune_development_draft.tex. It combines empirical dune development, KU Leuven erosion modelling, and Living Dunes modelling simulating dune restoration with 10 alternative/normal sediment types.

children.vegetation_development: Data regarding plant growth and coverage.

children.dune_modelling: Documentation related to dune modeling approaches.

evaluation.description: Analysis, results, and outputs meant for dissemination.

children.deliverables: Formal deliverables and reports (e.g., WP reports).
children.manuscript: Drafts and final versions of the core scientific manuscript (SOM_dune_development_draft.tex).

scripts.description: Source code for data processing and analysis.

children.common_garden: Scripts for the common garden experiment data.
children.germination: Scripts for analyzing germination experiment results.

output.description: Generated figures, tables, and processed datasets from the scripts/.

children.common_garden: Outputs from the common garden analysis.
